'''Ph'ton''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]], Ph'ton was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] due to his skills in the force and in lightsaber combat. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Master Ph'ton took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="SWGG" />

During the midst of war and chaos, Master Ph'ton was assigned to lead a mission to ensure the safety of the people of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. As his fleet moved to protect the world from [[Battle of Alderaan (Clone Wars)|attack]], Master Ph'ton was dismayed when [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Flynn Kybo]] absconded with a [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 interceptor]] and fled the battle, fearful that the young man would turn to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. Unbeknownst to the Bith, Kybo was off to face a fruitless battle with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], leader of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]], in hopes of assassinating the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]].<ref name="SWGG" />
